code:
import io
import string

mut running = true
while running
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    if not string.is_empty(line)
      let len = string.len(line)
      let category = if len <= 3
        "short"
      else if len <= 7
        "medium"
      else
        "long"
      end
      print("#{line} -> #{category}")
    end
  when None
    running = false
  end
end
